title: Immersive Cave Ambience
description: Enhance your cave ambience with skellies for ultimate spookiness
body:
![loaders: neoforge](https://img.shields.io/badge/NEOFORGE%20%7C%20FABRIC-ffffff?style=for-the-badge&label=LOADERS&labelColor=666d71&color=f2f7f7)   ![version: 1.21.1](https://img.shields.io/badge/1.21.1-ffffff?style=for-the-badge&label=VERSION&labelColor=666d71&color=f2f7f7)   ## Immersive Cave Ambience: *** It's not October as of writing this (oh no), but we can still do a spooky thing. This mod makes a skeleton gif walk over the screen every time the scary vanilla ambient cave sound plays. If you put this in your friend's mod folder, they'll find out the fun way (evil), tho this is not really a screamer, just spooky.
## Resourcepacks: *** This mod is technically resourcepackable. If you for some reason want to make one, you need to follow the [file structure](https://github.com/lethargistic/spooky/tree/1.21.1/common/src/main/resources) in the repo and make a spritesheet out of the gif/video frames. ### Credits: A femur for [Aaron](https://aaronhowser.dev/) for the idea:
